title: Clothes Rail - Double-Rod Clothes Rack with Built-In Hooks & Shelves, Multi-Functional Clothing Rail for Bedroom, Living Room, Entryway, 106 x 39 x 153cm, Black
features: DOUBLE HANGING SPACE: This clothing rail and shoe rack unit, measuring 106 x 39 x 153cm, includes 2 hanging rods for expanded storage. The added bar effectively doubles the capacity, allowing clothes to be separated by style or season. The increased space keeps all the clothes organized while eliminating the need for an additional clothes rack.

ALL-IN-ONE STORAGE: This wardrobe for bedroom combines hanging rods, side hooks, and sturdy shelves in a single unit. Each section of this rack provides a dedicated space for garments, footwear, and accessories. This versatile layout brings the function of several racks into one, helping you save space while keeping items tidy and accessible.

SOLID SUPPORT: Constructed from thick, rust-resistant metal and reinforced with secure screws, this heavy-duty clothes rail maintains a robust frame. Its U-shaped base provides extra lateral support, preventing the rack from tipping or wobbling. This reinforced design keeps heavy garments safely supported while ensuring long-lasting reliability.

USER-FRIENDLY DESIGN: Equipped with adjustable leveling feet, this free-standing clothes rail can be perfectly balanced on uneven floors, ensuring stability in any room. Non-slip stoppers on each rod end prevent coats, shirts, or jackets from sliding off. These thoughtful features help protect clothing while keeping your storage space neat and organized.

MULTI-SCENE STORAGE: This hanging rail for clothes is suitable for a variety of spaces, including bedrooms, entryways, laundry rooms, and living areas. Its compact footprint fits seamlessly into various locations without taking up too much space. This versatility ensures organized storage wherever it's needed, keeping clothing and accessories accessible.
